caption: A news broadcast features a split-screen layout with political figures and on-screen graphics. On the left, images of men like "सब्रत चौधरी" and "विजय सिन्हा" appear, while the right side shows "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," "विजय यादव," and "श्रवण कुमार." A central graphic displays a social media post from "Akhilesh Yadav" with text in Hindi. At the top, a red banner asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". A large "BREAKING" or "BREAKING NEWS" banner runs across the bottom, accompanied by a "MAHAREAD" logo and the time "10:05 PM". As the scene progresses, the figures on the left change to "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and the layout shifts slightly, with a new headline reading "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" appearing next to a "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. The overall visual style is typical of a fast-paced news report with scrolling text and dynamic image overlays.
